name: the-creative-act
description: Rick Rubin's The Creative Act — access your innate creativity through tuning in, letting go of expectations, and approaching creation as a way of being rather than a product to deliver
useCase: Helps anyone unlock their creative potential by shifting from "making art" to "living creatively" — using Rubin's philosophy of tuning in, receiving ideas, and letting go of outcomes.
knownRisks: Rubin's approach is philosophical and experiential — it complements but doesn't replace practical creative skills
